data.title: Corrupt ticket c364-5a18 missing ticket_type field causes ticket list consumers to crash
data.description: ticket c364-5a18 has only keys [ticket_id, status, error] — missing ticket_type, title, and other required fields. Any consumer iterating ticket list and accessing ticket_type without .get() will KeyError. The reducer should either exclude errored tickets from list output or ensure all tickets have the required schema fields.
